homepage.text_excerpt: Gill Furniss MP Skip to main content Gill Furniss MP Home About Gill Latest News Newsletters In Parliament Help and Advice Benefits Education Employment Issues Health and Social Care Housing Issues Immigration Legal Matters Local Government Policy and Legislation Privacy Policy Get in Touch Disability Access Pride in Parson Cross More Menu Gill Furniss Keep up with the latest news from me Read more Learn more about my work in Parliament Read more See the latest updates from the Labour Party Read more Prev Next Welcome to my website, I am proud to represent Sheffield Brightside and Hillsborough as your Member of Parliament since 2016. Our area faces many challenges and I will continue to stand up and make sure we have a strong voice in Parliament. You can find out more about my work by following me on Facebook , Twitter , YouTube and visiting the news page of my website. My team and I are here to help any constituent with a variety of issues you might need help with. Please take the time to check through the ‘ Help and Advice ‘ page to see how I could help you and find out how to get in touch here . pages.title: About Gill - Gill Furniss MP
pages.text_excerpt: About Gill - Gill Furniss MP Skip to main content Gill Furniss MP Home About Gill Latest News Newsletters In Parliament Help and Advice Benefits Education Employment Issues Health and Social Care Housing Issues Immigration Legal Matters Local Government Policy and Legislation Privacy Policy Get in Touch Disability Access Pride in Parson Cross More Menu About Gill Being the Member of Parliament for the area I was born in is the biggest privilege and one that I do not take lightly. If I can do anything to help you, please get in touch. - Gill Furniss MP I am immensely proud to have represented my home of Sheffield Brightside and Hillsborough as your MP since 2016. I was born and raised in Sheffield, my dad was a steelworker in the area. I started work at the age of 16 as a library assistant here in the constituency. I was an elected Councillor for 16 years, most recently representing Southey Ward. As a Cabinet Member on Sheffield City Council for 3 years in the areas of planning, regeneration, libraries, parks and waste management I was able to broaden my local knowledge. As a lifelong union member and shop steward I am proud to champion the rights of workers. In Parliament, I provide a strong voice for our local area and ensure that the challenges we face are on the political agenda. Your comments and suggestions are hugely valuable to myself and my team. Please do get in touch if I can be of any assistance. Gill Furniss MP Contact details Gill Furniss MP House of Commons London SW1A 0AA Gill Furniss MP House of Commons London SW1A 0AA '> View on Google Maps Email: gill.furniss.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Sheffield Brightside and Hillsborough Labour Party on behalf of Gill Furniss MP, both at Sheffield Labour Party, C/O Trades and Labour Club, Talbot Street, Sheffield, S2 2TG. ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. pages.title: Help and Advice - Gill Furniss MP
headings: h3: Below is a list of organisations that you may also wish to get in touch with to offer you some assistance. Please be aware the buttons link to external websites.
pages.text_excerpt: Help and Advice - Gill Furniss MP Skip to main content Gill Furniss MP Home About Gill Latest News Newsletters In Parliament Help and Advice Benefits Education Employment Issues Health and Social Care Housing Issues Immigration Legal Matters Local Government Policy and Legislation Privacy Policy Get in Touch Disability Access Pride in Parson Cross More Menu Help and Advice My team and I will always help where we can, but I have around 70,000 constituents as well as my Parliamentary duties to attend to. I have plenty of information below for you to look through to see if another organisation may be more appropriate to help with your issue. There is a strict parliamentary protocol which mean MPs can only help people who live in their constituency. If you are unsure who your MP is, you can find out here . If you have a personal issue (e.g. with immigration or benefits) and you live in Sheffield Brightside and Hillsborough, I may be able to offer you help. Click the following links to see how I can help with different issues: Benefits Education Employment Health and social care Housing Immigration Legal matters Council matters Policy and legislation Below is a list of organisations that you may also wish to get in touch with to offer you some assistance. Please be aware the buttons link to external websites. Parliament - Find your MP Sheffield City Council Sheffield City Region Mayor South Yorkshire Police Sheffield Citizens Advice Money Advice Service Shelter Samaritans Sheffield Domestic Abuse Helpline Assist Sheffield (Asylum Support) Gill Furniss MP Contact details Gill Furniss MP House of Commons London SW1A 0AA Gill Furniss MP House of Commons London SW1A 0AA '> View on Google Maps Email: gill.furniss.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Sheffield Brightside and Hillsborough Labour Party on behalf of Gill Furniss MP, both at Sheffield Labour Party, C/O Trades and Labour Club, Talbot Street, Sheffield, S2 2TG. ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. If you are not a member of a Trade Union you can find out about your employment rights from an advice agency such as Citizens Advice Sheffield or ACAS . If you require further assistance, please do get in touch . pages.title: Get in Touch - Gill Furniss MP
headings: h2: If you would like to get in touch, you can do so in the following ways:
h3: Due to strict Parliamentary rules, MPs can only assist their own constituents. Therefore, please ensure that you supply me with the following information:
h3: MPs’ Offices are NOT an emergency service. If you are in an emergency, contact 999 immediately. In a non-emergency situation, the below contact details may be useful:
h2: Follow me on social media
pages.text_excerpt: Get in Touch - Gill Furniss MP Skip to main content Gill Furniss MP Home About Gill Latest News Newsletters In Parliament Help and Advice Benefits Education Employment Issues Health and Social Care Housing Issues Immigration Legal Matters Local Government Policy and Legislation Privacy Policy Get in Touch Disability Access Pride in Parson Cross More Menu Get in Touch If you would like to get in touch, you can do so in the following ways: Email: gill.furniss.mp@parliament.uk Telephone (voicemail message only): 0114 234 9079 Postal address: Gill Furniss MP House of Commons London SW1A 0AA Due to strict Parliamentary rules, MPs can only assist their own constituents. Therefore, please ensure that you supply me with the following information: Your full name Full address, including postcode Contact telephone number Any relevant reference numbers (Home Office Reference Number, National Insurance Number, Application Number, etc.) Our case reference (e.g. GF123456) if you are emailing regarding an existing case Every day I receive hundreds of emails from constituents and organisations. My team will always endeavour to respond to constituents as quickly as possible. However, please allow 10 working days for us to reply. Emails where I am CC’d in will be taken note of and filed appropriately but will not be responded to. I am unable to respond to all lobbying and campaign emails due to the vast amount of these which I receive. I can assure you that all these emails are read and taken on board. MPs’ Offices are NOT an emergency service. If you are in an emergency, contact 999 immediately. In a non-emergency situation, the below contact details may be useful: South Yorkshire Police 101 NHS 111 Sheffield City Council 0114 273 4567 (8am to 6pm, Monday to Friday) Sheffield Citizens Advice 0344 411 311 (10am to 4pm, Monday to Friday) Shelter 0808 800 4444 (8am to 8pm weekdays, 9am to 5pm weekends) Sheffield Domestic Abuse Helpline 0808 808 2241 (8am to 8pm weekdays, 9am to 5pm Saturday) National Domestic Violence Helpline 0808 200 0247 Assist (Asylum Support) 0114 275 4960 Migrant Help (Asylum Helpline) 0808 801 0503 Follow me on social media Residents Survey 2025 Gill Furniss MP Contact details Gill Furniss MP House of Commons London SW1A 0AA Gill Furniss MP House of Commons London SW1A 0AA '> View on Google Maps Email: gill.furniss.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Sheffield Brightside and Hillsborough Labour Party on behalf of Gill Furniss MP, both at Sheffield Labour Party, C/O Trades and Labour Club, Talbot Street, Sheffield, S2 2TG. ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
